frontier_tests_on_V12_M1_average.status: not certified in time; region contains known optimum

new_attempts_after_literature_review.name: CCBI exact objective reformulation
new_attempts_after_literature_review.description: Charnes-Cooper-style scaling with t=1/S and binary-continuous products t*y_i, making the Gini term linear in scaled ratios while keeping P unscaled.
new_attempts_after_literature_review.exactness: exact if solved to zero MIP gap
new_attempts_after_literature_review.observed_result: On V12_M1_average, HiGHS did not certify within the run; after about 26.9 s the incumbent was 0.3745467773 and the lower bound was about 0.2802841398; the run later exceeded the interactive timeout without certificate. This was worse than the strengthened MILP.

new_attempts_after_literature_review.name: Two-dimensional G-P box branch-and-cut
new_attempts_after_literature_review.description: Partition the (G,P) plane. For fixed boxes, G lower/upper bounds become linear inequalities V*g_lo*S <= H <= V*g_hi*S and P bounds are linear. Prune boxes by g_lo + lambda*p_lo.
new_attempts_after_literature_review.exactness: exact up to tolerance if all boxes are fathomed and each feasibility MILP is solved to certificate
new_attempts_after_literature_review.observed_result: On V12_M1_average with the known incumbent 0.3572005832, a 20.9 s run improved the valid lower bound to 0.3116565011 but did not close the certificate. Some sub-box infeasibility proofs became hard.

new_attempts_after_literature_review.name: Route-relaxed master with route-load oracle
new_attempts_after_literature_review.description: Drop arc/load variables from the master and check incumbents by an exact DP route-load oracle.
new_attempts_after_literature_review.exactness: exact only if all invalid incumbent patterns are separated by valid cuts
new_attempts_after_literature_review.observed_result: The small master is attractive, but simple no-good cuts were too weak. Strong lifted resource-route cuts or a true branch-price-and-cut implementation are still needed.

requirements_status.exact_global_solution: partially met: one uploaded instance certified; all new reformulations are exact in principle but not all completed
requirements_status.small_network_under_100_seconds_multiple: not met for full original objective; met only for Gini-cap subproblems
requirements_status.no_sample_specific_patch: met in model design; all tests use the same formulations and parameters except disabling subset cuts in two cap-subproblem runs due solver stalling
requirements_status.comparable_to_tailored_BRP_exact_literat: directionally aligned, but current implementation is not yet strong enough
requirements_status.complexity_statement: finite but exponential; DP route oracle is O(2^s s^2 Q) for s served stations in the elementary exact version
